overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's commercial district. The player moves along a sidewalk past futuristic billboards, examines a unique treaded police vehicle, and enters a covered plaza filled with a protesting crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing the futuristic cityscape and various pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements

notable_agents.action: police officer standing near the railing observing the street
woman in red business attire walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large beige commercial building with illuminated WALL signage and vertical blue lettering
massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements on the building facade
dedicated red-painted bus or transit lane running parallel to the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street median between sidewalk and road
futuristic terminal with glowing screen displaying FEEL THE RUSH advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic commercial sidewalk in Night City next to a red transit lane. The WALL building dominates the right side with massive digital billboards. Various pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements populate the walkway, including a police officer and a woman in distinctive red clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with street vendor and approaching police vehicle

events.description: futuristic police car with tank treads comes into view parked on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a street vendor's magazine stand and observing the unusual police vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: vendor arranging colorful magazines and publications on a display rack

entered.detail: rotating display rack covered with futuristic magazines featuring anime-style covers and bold typography
futuristic armored police vehicle with tank treads instead of wheels and POLICE markings

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past a magazine stand displaying colorful futuristic publications. A unique police car with tank-like treads is parked ahead, drawing attention as the camera approaches the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: street area with parked police vehicle and plaza entrance

events.description: camera slows and circles around the police car to examine its futuristic design from multiple angles
crossing the street and approaching the entrance to a covered plaza area

agents.ego_description: circling the police vehicle to inspect its details then proceeding toward the covered plaza entrance

entered.detail: large overpass or covered structure spanning across the street ahead
yellow and white striped barricades and concrete blocks blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the armored police vehicle, showcasing its futuristic treaded design and mesh-covered windows. After inspecting the vehicle from multiple angles, the perspective moves past it and crosses toward a covered plaza entrance marked by security barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with protest gathering and security checkpoint

events.description: entering a dense crowd of protesters holding signs and gathering in the covered plaza

agents.ego_description: moving through the dense crowd of protesters and onlookers in the covered plaza area

notable_agents.action: protester with red mohawk and skull mask gesturing with arms raised
protester in bright green jacket with glowing elements holding a sign

entered.detail: large gathering of people holding signs and milling about in the plaza
vertical banners and flags hanging on the building walls including a red and black flag
metal barrel with fire burning inside providing light and heat to the gathering
yellow caution tape and concrete barriers blocking off sections of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dense crowd gathered in a covered plaza beneath a massive overpass. Protesters hold signs and mill about near burning barrels and security barriers. The atmosphere shifts to a more tense, crowded environment with artificial lighting and yellow caution tape marking restricted areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, high-tech commercial sidewalk into the tense atmosphere of a crowded protest plaza. It begins by moving along a futuristic walkway beside a red transit lane, passing cybernetically enhanced pedestrians beneath the massive digital billboards of the WALL building. As the camera continues past a colorful magazine stand, it slows to circle a unique, armored police vehicle featuring tank-like treads and mesh-covered windows. The perspective then shifts away from the vehicle, crossing toward a covered plaza entrance marked by security barriers. Finally, the scene opens into a dense gathering beneath a massive overpass, where the environment transforms into a scene of unrest filled with protesters, burning barrels, and yellow caution tape under artificial lighting.
